title: capture-buffer.file_dropped
description: T20:capture-buffer file_dropped event (WS-321 Phase B). Emitted by /session-end when adoption_phase=M0 and a new file appears under system/ that doesn't match a kit template. Distinct from note_added: notes/ is the canonical scratch surface; file_dropped catches founder-authored content elsewhere.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the dropped file

first_line.description: First non-empty line for proposal preview (capped at 200 chars)
